canonical_answer: A man wearing a blue t-shirt and khaki shorts kneels on the deck of a small boat floating on calm water. He reaches towards a small object swimming in the water near the boat's side. An orange tabby cat with white paws is seen resting on the grey carpeted deck near several fishing rods. The man pets the cat while surrounded by dense green trees on the shoreline.
